overall.description: A third-person game sequence showing a hooded character exploring a Japanese temple garden in spring. The character walks through a misty flower meadow, crosses a wooden bridge, and enters the Kinkakuji Temple complex while passing villagers and cherry blossom trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty flower meadow with wildflowers and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tall flower meadow, approaching a distant temple complex

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing in the flower field near the temple approach

entered.detail: dense field of purple and white wildflowers covering the ground
tall deciduous trees framing the meadow edges
traditional wooden temple gate visible through the morning mist
narrow waterway running parallel to the path on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, misty meadow filled with blooming purple flowers. The character walks forward through the tall grass, with a small stream visible to the left and a traditional Japanese temple gate looming in the distant center. Distant figures can be seen near the temple approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway leading to temple bridge

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to compacted stone and dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone path toward the wooden bridge and temple gate

entered.detail: worn pathway of compacted earth and flat stones leading to the temple
traditional wooden arched bridge with railings spanning a small waterway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the flower meadow onto a compacted stone path. The wooden bridge and temple gate grow larger in the center view as the character approaches. The surrounding vegetation becomes less dense, with a large pine tree visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge and temple entrance gate

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge structure
passing through the large wooden temple gate into the complex

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and passing through the temple gate into the sacred grounds

entered.detail: large traditional wooden gate with curved tile roof and hanging paper lanterns
carved stone lantern posts flanking the bridge entrance
open stone-paved area visible through the gate archway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wooden bridge and approaches the imposing temple gate. Passing under the curved roof of the gate, the lighting shifts to dappled shadows. Through the archway, the temple courtyard and cherry blossom trees become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with cherry blossoms and traditional buildings

events.description: exiting the gate shadow into the sunlit temple courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard, observing the architecture and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in traditional clothing standing near the garden rocks
temple visitor walking across the courtyard toward the main hall

entered.detail: large tree with pink sakura blooms casting petals on the ground
wooden temple structures with tiled roofs surrounding the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the character enters a sunlit cobblestone courtyard surrounded by traditional wooden temple buildings. Cherry blossom trees bloom on the left, scattering pink petals. Several NPC villagers and visitors are scattered throughout the courtyard, some walking and others standing near the garden rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, wildflower meadow into the structured sunlight of a traditional temple courtyard. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and blooming purple flowers toward a distant temple gate, with a small stream flowing to the left. As the character transitions onto a compacted stone path, the surrounding vegetation thins and a large pine tree appears before the wooden bridge and gate loom larger in the center view. The scene then shifts into dappled shadows as the camera passes under the curved roof of the imposing gate, revealing a glimpse of the inner sanctuary. Finally, the view opens into a sunlit cobblestone courtyard where pink petals from blooming cherry blossom trees scatter around visiting villagers and traditional wooden buildings.
